walkthroughs.title: Java Upgrade Modernization
walkthroughs.description: In this lab Bob will upgrade your Java application to a newer version

steps.description: Learn how Bob transforms complex Java upgrades into streamlined, low-risk modernization journeys
steps.title: Java Upgrade

steps.description:
Begin your Java upgrade process by creating a new modernization task. If you're working in a Java workspace, you can easily initiate this process through the workflow interface with a single click.
[Start new Java modernization task](command:bob-walkthroughs.chat.javaModernization)
steps.title: Launch Your Upgrade

steps.description:
Before beginning the upgrade process, Bob analyzes your workspace and tailors the experience to your needs.

Select the options that best match your requirements, then choose "Java Upgrade" to proceed.
steps.title: Select "Java Upgrade" Modernization

steps.description:
Select the Java version you want to upgrade to. Bob handles all the technical details — if your selected version isn't already installed, Bob will automatically set it up for you.

Then, Bob will execute recipes to begin transforming your codebase.
steps.title: Choose Your Target Version

steps.description:
After applying the recipe, Bob automatically identifies any errors or warnings and begins resolving them. During this phase, Bob works intelligently to fix issues while keeping you in control.

You can monitor progress in real-time and provide guidance whenever needed, but Bob handles the complex technical details.
steps.title: Automated Upgrade

steps.description:
With errors resolved and your application building successfully, your Java upgrade is nearly complete! Bob now provides a comprehensive visual summary of all changes made during the modernization process.

This intuitive diagram highlights key modifications, giving you complete visibility into how your codebase has evolved and what improvements have been implemented.
steps.title: Upgrade Summary

steps.description:
Your Java upgrade is complete! All that remains is to validate that your application builds correctly and all tests pass. Your project now leverages the latest Java features and patterns.

Bob has handled the technical complexities of the upgrade process, but if you encounter any minor issues, Bob remains available to help resolve them quickly.
steps.title: Validation

walkthroughs.title: Liberty Replatforming
walkthroughs.description: In this lab Bob will replatform your application to Liberty

steps.description: Discover how Bob simplifies the complex process of migrating applications to Liberty
steps.title: Liberty Replatforming

steps.description:
Start your Liberty replatforming journey by creating a new modernization task. If you're working within a Java workspace, you can easily initiate this process through the workflow interface.

This action launches Bob's comprehensive analysis of your application, identifying compatibility requirements and preparing the optimal migration path to Liberty.
[Start new Java modernization task](command:bob-walkthroughs.chat.javaModernization)
steps.title: Launch Your Migration

steps.description:
Before beginning the replatforming process, Bob analyzes your workspace and tailors the experience to your specific needs. Select the options that best match your requirements.

Choose "Liberty Replatforming" to initiate the transformation process and provide your AMA (Application Modernization Accelerator) deployment plan ZIP file.

For this lab, use path of the ZIP file in  the 'migration-bundle' folder.

 Bob will then begin the comprehensive migration of your application to the Liberty platform.
[Learn about AMA](https://www.ibm.com/docs/en/ama?topic=accelerator-application-modernization)
steps.title: Select "Liberty Replatforming" Modernization

steps.description:
After initiating the Liberty replatforming process, Bob conducts a thorough analysis of your application architecture and automatically identifies compatibility requirements and configuration needs.

During this migration phase, Bob works to transform your application for Liberty, handling complex technical details while keeping you in control. You can monitor progress in real-time and provide guidance whenever needed.
steps.title: Automated Upgrade

steps.description:
With compatibility issues resolved and your application configured for Liberty, your replatforming process is nearly complete! Bob now provides a comprehensive visual summary of all changes made during the migration.

This intuitive diagram highlights key modifications and adaptations, giving you complete visibility into how your application has been optimized for the Liberty environment.
steps.title: Replatforming Summary

steps.description:
All that remains is to deploy your application to Liberty and validate its functionality. Your project now fully leverages Liberty's lightweight, flexible runtime environment and is ready for modern cloud deployments.

Bob has handled the technical complexities of the migration process, but if you encounter any deployment issues, Bob remains available to help resolve them quickly.
steps.title: Deployment
